ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary for Upcoming Trip
ham.body:
Hello John,

I hope you are doing well. Please find below the details for your upcoming business trip:

- Destination: New York City
- Flight: AA 1234
- Departure: 15th May 2026, 08:00 AM (JFK)
- Arrival: 15th May 2026, 11:00 AM (JFK)
- Return: 20th May 2026, 05:30 PM (LAX)
- Hotel: The Ritz-Carlton, Los Angeles

If you have any changes or need assistance with travel arrangements, feel free to let me know.

Thank you and safe travels!

Best regards,
Emily Smith
Travel Coordinator

---
Travel Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear John,

This is an urgent notification from the Human Resources Department regarding your recent payroll processing. During our routine audit, we identified a discrepancy in your latest paycheck which requires immediate correction.

To resolve this issue and ensure that your next salary is processed on time, please verify your banking details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you do not update your information by the end of the business day, your future payments may be delayed. Failure to comply may also result in a review of your employment status.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Michael Johnson
HR Manager

HR Department
Company Inc.
